title: QiuymMod
description: Added unique items such as the sickle with optimized crafting recipes, significantly reducing resource gathering difficulty. Features custom animations, models, textures,and includes data packs that expand gameplay.Enhancing survival and creative gameplay.
body:
Qiuym Mod

Qiuym Mod is a Minecraft mod that expands the game's toolset by adding unique, functionally distinct items. It is designed to streamline resource gathering and provide new options for both survival and creative gameplay.

What does this mod add?

- New Tools & Items: Introduces several new items with specialized properties.
  - Sickle: A high-damage melee weapon with an extended attack range.
  - Silicon Pickaxe: A pickaxe with significantly increased mining speed compared to Netherite.
- Gameplay Mechanics: Includes a custom FeedOnKill data pack. This system grants the player saturation effects upon defeating mobs, scaling with the number killed in quick succession (capped for balance).
- Cross-Mod Compatibility: Adds a crafting recipe for the slashblade:resharped item from the SlashBlade mod.
- Visuals: Features custom 3D models, textures, and animations for its new items.

Key Features & Purpose

This mod focuses on utility and efficiency. The new tools are crafted to reduce the time and effort required for common tasks like mining and combat. The additional mechanics, such as the FeedOnKill effect, are designed to integrate seamlessly with vanilla survival, offering small but meaningful gameplay enhancements without overwhelming complexity.

Technical Details

- Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
- Mod Loader: Forge (47.4.12+)
- Performance: Lightweight and optimized for stable frame rates.
